text: Standing here, I feel a mix of curiosity and anticipation. The glass walls and clean design evoke transparency and openness, yet a certain sterility permeates the space. As I move closer to the vibrant R+D display, my thoughts are stirred by the themes of research and innovation, and I sense a subtle excitement about humanity’s continuous quest to understand and collaborate with machines. The hum of technology and the promise of discovery inspire me, but there’s also a slight sense of alienation in this hyper-modern environment.
